uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.classpath.JarMetadata

Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.nb.tools.java
Provides Java-specific toolkits that leverage the NetBeans Java Source and Parsing APIs.
uno.anahata.asi.toolkit.java.classpath
Provides metadata-aware classpath inspection and token-optimized formatting.
